Google top-tier AI (Nano Banana Pro, Imagen 4 Ultra, Veo 3.1) plus multi-provider video (Higgsfield, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0). 14 domain-specialized subagents, 14 skills, 54 MCP tools, smart-routing quality reviewer, dual surface (Claude Code plugin + MCP server + CLI).
